testcase.name: test_a3_search_by_email

failure.message: assert False + where False = any(<generator object TestAListEndpoints.test_a3_search_by_email.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0xfddf7088a5e0>)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter109_users_permissions.py:280: in test_a3_search_by_email assert any("TEST.super.a" in u["email"].lower() for u in users) E assert False E + where False = any(<generator object TestAListEndpoints.test_a3_search_by_email.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0xfddf7088a5e0>)

testcase.name: test_a4_search_by_name

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected to find partner admin by name, got: [] assert 0 >= 1 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter109_users_permissions.py:292: in test_a4_search_by_name assert len(users) >= 1, f"Expected to find partner admin by name, got: {users}" E AssertionError: Expected to find partner admin by name, got: [] E assert 0 >= 1 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_b5_same_email_different_tenant_allowed
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter109_users_permissions.py:504: in test_b5_same_email_different_tenant_allowed assert resp.status_code in (200, 201), f"Expected 200 for same email diff tenant, got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200 for same email diff tenant, got 400: {"detail":"Email already registered"} E assert 400 in (200, 201) E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_b10_password_complexity_validation
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter109_users_permissions.py:607: in test_b10_password_complexity_validation assert resp.status_code in (400, 422), f"Expected 400/422 for weak password, got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 400/422 for weak password, got 200: {"message":"Admin user created","user_id":"e71e3659-2c32-471b-8745-273f96bbdc2c","email":"TEST.weakpw@iter109.test"} E assert 200 in (400, 422) E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_f2_platform_admin_sees_all

failure.message: AssertionError: Platform admin should see Tenant A users. Available: {'admin@verifytest.com', 'test.norole.b9@iter109.test', 'test.edittarget@iter109.test', 'test.staff.a@iter109.test', 'test.super.b@iter109.test', 'test.custom.b8@iter109.test', 'test.tokenv@iter109.test', 'test.perms.create@iter109.test', 'test.admin.a@iter109.test', 'test.newadmin.b1@iter109.test', 'admin@automateaccounts.local', 'test.manager.b7@iter109.test', 'test.weakpw@iter109.test', 'test.statustarget@iter109.test', 'test.super.a@iter109.test'} assert 'TEST.super.a@iter109.test' in {'admin@automateaccounts.local', 'admin@verifytest.com', 'test.admin.a@iter109.test', 'test.custom.b8@iter109.test', 'test.edittarget@iter109.test', 'test.manager.b7@iter109.test', ...}

testcase.name: test_f3_tenant_a_cannot_see_tenant_b_users

failure.message: AssertionError: Cross-tenant user data leak detected: {'test.newadmin.b1@iter109.test'} assert not {'test.newadmin.b1@iter109.test'}

skipped.message: Could not create token version test user: {"detail":"Email already registered"}

testcase.name: test_ds2_tenants_create_admin_alternative_path
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter109_users_permissions.py:1508: in test_ds2_tenants_create_admin_alternative_path assert resp.status_code in (400, 403, 404), ( E AssertionError: Expected 400/403/404 for create-admin under platform tenant, got 422: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","tenant_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"email":"TEST.platform.tenant@iter109.test","password":"TestPlatformTenant109!","full_name":"TEST Platform Tenant User","role":"partner_super_admin"}}]} E assert 422 in (400, 403, 404) E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
